executionHistory.summary: DevOps probe found DEVOPS-011-F1: MAPS_ENABLED env var generated by SST but dead code — config.Config never reads it, connectors.go never checks it. Maps connector auto-starts whenever MAPS_IMPORT_DIR is non-empty, ignoring the enabled flag.

Added MapsEnabled bool field to config.Config, loaded from MAPS_ENABLED env var. Changed maps auto-start guard from cfg.MapsImportDir != '' to cfg.MapsEnabled && cfg.MapsImportDir != ''. Added test coverage in validate_test.go.

All 42 Go packages pass. cmd/core recompiled cleanly (0.564s). internal/config tests pass (0.227s) including new MapsEnabled assertions. internal/connector/maps cached (no changes to connector itself). Lint clean. Check passes.
